records.ety: [From L. votus, p. p. vovere to vow, to devote. See Vote, Vow.]

defs: Consecrated by a vow or promise; consequent on a vow; devoted; promised.
quotes: Votary resolution is made equipollent to custom.

defs: One devoted, consecrated, or engaged by a vow or promise; hence, especially, one devoted, given, or addicted, to some particular service, worship, study, or state of life.
quotes: 'T was coldness of the votary, not the prayer, that was in fault.
But thou, my votary, weepest thou?
